extraction.article_title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Finds Thousands of Zero-Day Flaws Across Major Systems

ttps.description: Exploit public-facing application by chaining software vulnerabilities to escape sandboxing or browser isolation.
Privilege escalation via multi-stage exploit chains that move from browser renderer compromise to sandbox escape.

attack_chain: Initial compromise of a browser renderer or application process
Exploit chaining to bypass sandbox boundaries
Potential follow-on execution or lateral movement
proposed_phase_updates: Add browser exploit-chain detection for renderer compromise followed by sandbox escape indicators.
Add validation for memory corruption in media-processing pipelines and virtualized components.
